subcodes.first_line: O Thou Forgiver and Pardoner! I cast my face and soil my brow in the dust at the threshold of Thy sacred court, beseeching Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا غافری و یا عفوی انی اعفر وجهی و اغبر جبینی بترباء فناء حضره قدسک مستدعیا
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @prayer for forgiveness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
